## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Nigel Hammett for the Account Executive role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proactive Builder:** At WriteSonic, Nigel built the sales process from scratch (HubSpot, battle cards) to enable forecasting and automation, filling a critical operational gap.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [**Strategic Deal Closer:** Won a $5M Google Cloud deal by creating a personal connection and leveraging team resources, overcoming a prospect's existing relationships with Amazon and Azure.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
  - [**Deep SEO/GEO Expertise:** Has 6 months of experience in the AI content space at WriteSonic, a competitor to GrowthX, giving him direct insight into the market and prospect objections.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [**Strong Cultural Fit:** Seeks an entrepreneurial environment, mirroring Tyler's own experience building the sales function at GrowthX, and was an original candidate for the role.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

## Topics

### Background & Motivation

  - [**Career Path:** Started at Meta & Google (ads/cloud), then moved to startups for remote flexibility.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [**Current Role:** Account Executive at WriteSonic, an AI content platform (SEO/GEO).](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [**Motivation for GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [Original interest from a job search in June.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [Desire to join a "rocket ship" with exponential growth.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [Interest in the AI content space.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

### WriteSonic Experience: Building Sales from Scratch

  - [**Context:** Joined as the 3rd AE; the lead AE was on a 40-day vacation, requiring immediate self-sufficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [**Process Building:** Implemented the sales infrastructure from scratch to enable forecasting and automation.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [**HubSpot:** Set up the CRM, pipeline stages, and lead-routing workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [**Sales Assets:** Developed scripts and battle cards against competitors (Profound, Scrunch).](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [**Sales Cycle & Post-Sale:**](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [**Inbound-Heavy:** Strong brand generates leads; price is the main objection.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [**Post-Sale Involvement:** Creates contracts/invoices and sets up client Slack channels to ensure a smooth handoff to the lean CS team.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

### Deal Examples & Sales Methodology

  - [**WriteSonic: Paradigm Agency (Win)**](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [**Method:** Used the SPICE framework (Situation, Pain, Individual Contributors, Context, Champions).](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
      - [**Tactic:** Held individual "office hours" with team members to build consensus before group calls, avoiding surface-level agreement.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
      - [**Value Prop:** Positioned WriteSonic as the only tool offering both SEO and GEO content creation, not just AI search tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**Google Cloud: marketing.ai (Win)**](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
      - [**Context:** $5M multi-year deal with a prospect (CEO Kevin Wassum) already engaged with Amazon and Azure.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
      - [**Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
          - [**Personal Connection:** Met the CEO at a conference.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
          - [**Doubt Creation:** Planted seeds of doubt by asking if the CEO wanted to risk missing a better opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
          - [**Resource Leverage:** Brought in AI specialists to provide a human connection and build trust that competitors lacked.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
      - [**Self-Critique:** Could have secured a larger deal ($7-8M) with more patience; also missed opportunities for case studies and network expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=2130.0)

### GrowthX Context & Sales Structure

  - [**Current State (Tyler):**](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=2286.0)
      - [**Role:** The sole AE, building the sales function without a direct manager.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=2286.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Lacked SEO expertise initially; now focused on personalizing the sales process to show specific client ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=2368.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build custom demo workspaces and perform keyword analysis to help prospects visualize their future with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=2396.0)
  - [**Sales Process Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=2509.0)
      - [**Established:** ICP scoring, demo process, handoff process, and proof points (case studies, references).](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=2509.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Personalize the sales process to show specific ROI, moving beyond generic demos.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=2595.0)
  - [**Prospect Profile:** A mix of educational-stage and shopping-stage leads, all eager to understand GEO.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=2667.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Provide feedback to Tucker and Bridget.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=2799.0)
  - [**Nigel:** Await next steps from the GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/kKPr43yf6eh4_d3q_cn62_q37MUZj5Pw?tab=summary&timestamp=2799.0)
